title: 8Pcs Christmas Tree Hanging Ornaments Christmas Lollipop Ornament Christmas Candy Hanging Tree Party Decoration, Xmas Lollipop Hanging Pendant with Bow and Cord for Christmas Tree Fireplace Decoration
features: 【Christmas Tree Hanging Decorations】You will get 8 pieces lollipop hanging decoration in different styles. You can use them to decorate your Christmas tree, holiday party, fireplace in this Xmas holiday.

【Premium Quality】 These mini cute Christmas candy hanging ornaments are made of high quality soft pottery material, which is durable, soft and comfortable to touch, not easy to fade, non-edible, light wight, reusable, not easy to deform and can be used for a long time.
【Size Information】 The length of each Christmas lollipop candy hanging ornaments is approx.9.5cm/3.74inch. Each Christmas tree hanging ornament comes with string for easy hanging.

【Design for Christmas】 These lollipop hanging pendant decorations are adopted with Christmas classic color and with a cute bow. You can hang the cute treat ornaments on the Christmas tree, Christmas wreath, windows, yard, Xmas gift to create a strong Christmas warm and joyful atmosphere for your home.

【Wide Applications】 These lovely Xmas lollipop hanging ornament is not only a great decoration for Christmas tree, stockings, lamp, windows, fireplaces; You also can use them to DIY all kinds of crafts to decorate your holiday or as a perfect gift for your children and families.
description: Product description Guaksxi 8Pcs Christmas Sweet Lollipop Ornament Xmas Tree Hanging Pendant Decoration Christmas Tree Lollipop Hanging Ornament Festive Holiday Christmas Decoration Design for Christmas Holiday: These sweet lollipop decorations are adopted with Christmas classic color and designed with a cute bow. These classic colors can fit Christmas theme well, ideal decoration choices for Christmas trees, fireplace, Christmas wreath, etc. Each hanging lollipop Christmas ornament comes with a string loop, You can hang the cute candy pendants on the Christmas tree, windows, yard, Xmas gift to create a strong Christmas atmosphere for your home. The Xmas tree hanging pendant decorations are design with cute lollipop patterns and welcome by kids and children. Lovely candy hanging ornament is not only a great decoration for Christmas tree, stockings, lamp, windows, fireplaces; You also can use them to DIY all kinds of crafts to decorate your holiday or as a perfect holiday gift for your children and families.
